prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Crystal structure of the wild-type Thermus thermophilus 70S ribosome in complex with benzoxaborole derivative of azithromycin (AZI-BB2), mRNA, aminoacylated A-site Phe-tRNAphe, aminoacylated P-site fMet-tRNAmet, and deacylated E-site tRNAphe at 2.45A resolution. Entity description: 50S ribosomal protein L28. Entry keywords: RIBOSOME Macrolides, azithromycin, benzoxaboroles, ribosome, translation, inhibition, antibiotic, drug resistance. Polymer composition: protein/NA. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.367347; mean_interface=0.245498; max_segment_membrane_density=0.809524; mean_disorder=0.196307. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 cofactor sentinel source. cofactor_context ligand_context cofactor-stabilized soluble core; components: MG ZN. Not assembly_required_core and no explicit transmembrane topology evidence.
